{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603220424322EBC1DADAB0855FE5203\"}"},"total":18},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7408728830659986238","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情发展精彩，好想知道后面的量劫怎么去完成。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724985446,"group_id":"7402952342456241177","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4LWSYJlaDe0mbptEGwMMDU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776702450\u0026x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"98552402992","user_name":"让自己舒爽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"98552402992","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662588055,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7402952342456241177","book_info":{"abstract":"一朝醒来，陈长生穿越鸿蒙之初。修行无望，洪荒凶险万重。无奈之下，他只得苟在一处山脉之中，种花养草、刻印玉石，以及讲讲前世网文排遣孤寂。但也因此，吸引了百万生灵前来听他“讲故事”。眼看龙汉初劫、道魔之争在即。陈长生不得不遣散百万生灵，一心再次苟起来。殊不知，前来听陈长生讲“故事”的，皆是当世大能巨擘。众人下山，洪荒也被彻底玩坏了。通天：“一株草可斩日月星辰，本座这一剑，谁人能敌？！”女娲：“一念花开，君临天下！”罗睺：“本座将化身洪荒天地的黑暗动乱，清算小人鸿钧。”望舒、后土、羲和嫦曦、越来越多的人，以陈长生弟子自居。鸿钧傻眼：“打不过就加入！不知长生师尊，能否收我为弟子？”而陈长生也发现，自己并非毫无修为，只是......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/62e1c3429040932800b2fd2b9ebeadc8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"剑仙","author_id":"","book_id":"7402952342456241177","book_name":"洪荒：苟到圣人的我，被女娲曝光","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":257,\"name\":\"玄幻脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257\u0026name=玄幻脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":66,\"name\":\"洪荒\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66\u0026name=洪荒\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":452,\"name\":\"架空\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452\u0026name=架空\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":453,\"name\":\"开局\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453\u0026name=开局\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":511,\"name\":\"东方玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511\u0026name=东方玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7403649758591470617","read_count":"300","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"178873"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"87","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,洪荒,架空,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/62e1c3429040932800b2fd2b9ebeadc8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779308672\u0026x-signature=f4CQaryDkx6haaUdjut2bI%2FLOIY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"log_extr
